tagline: Compassionate Care, Up-to-Date Treatment, Stronger Horses.
seoDescription: Empire Equine is a horse veterinary practice in Santa Rosa, CA serving Sonoma County. Owned by UC Davis-trained equine vet Dr. Michelle Beko, offering preventative care, lameness evaluations, dentistry, reproduction, diagnostics, prepurchase exams, and 24/7 emergency care. Call (707) 545-3909.
heroHeading: Expert Equine Veterinary Care in the Heart of Sonoma County
heroSubheading: From pasture pets to upper-level performance horses, Dr. Michelle Beko and the Empire Equine team deliver compassionate, up-to-date care for every horse in Santa Rosa and the surrounding region.
highlights: Owned by Dr. Michelle Beko, DVM, a UC Davis veterinary graduate (1991) who joined the practice in 1992
24/7 emergency equine care for established clients
Member of the American Association of Equine Practitioners (AAEP) and the AVMA
Care for all equids — horses, ponies, miniatures, donkeys, and mules
Annual Health Maintenance Program with two visits a year and a 10% discount on additional services
Ambulatory farm calls plus haul-in options — call to check availability
aboutHeading: Decades of Equine Expertise, Built on a Lasting Legacy
aboutBody: Empire Equine was originally founded decades ago by Dr. Jack Woolsey and Dr. Bob Norrie, who built a reputation for dedicated horse care in Sonoma County. Today the practice is owned by Dr. Michelle Beko, who continues that legacy of excellence at 2318 Olivet Lane in northwest Santa Rosa.

Dr. Beko graduated from the UC Davis School of Veterinary Medicine in 1991 and, after completing a private-practice internship in Ventura County, joined Empire Equine in 1992. She is a member of the American Association of Equine Practitioners and the American Veterinary Medical Association, has served on advisory boards for UC Davis, teaches at Santa Rosa Junior College, and has edited for the Sonoma County Horse Journal. A lifelong horse owner and former eventing competitor, she brings deep experience both in the saddle and in the exam.

The practice cares for every kind of horse — from pasture pets and pleasure horses to upper-level sport and performance horses, and welcomes ponies, miniatures, donkeys, and mules. Empire Equine is committed to supporting novice and experienced owners alike, offering the education and full-service care that bring peace of mind knowing your horse is in capable, caring hands.

services.title: Preventative & Wellness Care
services.description: Routine physical exams, vaccinations, and parasite control, plus an Annual Health Maintenance Program with two yearly visits and a 10% discount on additional services.

services.title: Lameness Evaluations
services.description: Thorough exams to locate the source of pain or poor performance, helping keep both pleasure and sport horses sound and comfortable.

services.title: Dental Care
services.description: Dental assessments, treatments, and teeth floating to maintain healthy mouths and proper nutrition.

services.title: Reproductive Services
services.description: Breeding support including artificial insemination to help horse owners plan and manage successful pregnancies.

services.title: Diagnostics & Prepurchase Exams
services.description: Advanced diagnostic technology for accurate identification of conditions, plus prepurchase examinations to inform buying decisions.

services.title: 24/7 Emergency Care
services.description: Round-the-clock emergency veterinary services to address urgent equine health concerns whenever they arise — available to established clients of the practice.

notes:
SOURCES: Own site empirequine.com (home, /about, /contact, /faq) and older site empire-equine.com; madbarn.com equine directory profile for Dr. Beko; BBB profile (bbb.org/.../empire-equine-1116-969329); Yelp listing (yelp.com/biz/empire-equine-santa-rosa, returned 403 so reviews not read). Phone (707) 545-3909 and address 2318 Olivet Ln, Santa Rosa CA 95401 cross-confirmed across all sources — correct business, no conflation.

CONFIRMED FACTS: Owner Dr. Michelle Beko, DVM; UC Davis vet school grad 1991; joined Empire Equine 1992 (used as 'Est. 1992' for her tenure); AAEP + AVMA member; UC Davis advisory boards, teaches at Santa Rosa Junior College, edited Sonoma County Horse Journal; former eventing competitor and horse owner. Practice originally founded 'decades ago' by Dr. Jack Woolsey and Dr. Bob Norrie. Tagline 'Compassionate Care, Up-to-Date Treatment, Stronger Horses' is verbatim from homepage. Services, 24/7 emergency, annual health program (two visits, 10% discount), haul-in/ambulatory, payment (cash/check/MC/Visa), Sonoma County service area all from their own site.

CAVEATS / UNVERIFIED: (1) EXACT FOUNDING YEAR of the original practice is NOT stated anywhere ('decades ago' only). 'Est. 1992' reflects Dr. Beko's start, not the original founding — flagged for accuracy. (2) BBB lists the business as 'started 3/27/2025' with A- rating; this almost certainly reflects a recent LLC re-registration/rebrand under Beko, NOT the actual age of the practice — did NOT use this as founding date. (3) NO public star rating or review count found — Yelp blocked (403), Google rating not retrievable via search; rating and testimonials left EMPTY rather than fabricated. (4) SOCIAL MEDIA: search surfaced facebook.com/empirequestrian and instagram.com/empirehorses ('Empire Equine Services, LLC'), but these appear to be a separate equestrian/sales entity, NOT confirmed as the vet practice's official accounts — left BLANK to avoid linking the wrong business. (5) Email address not published on site. (6) Photo URLs are from their own website CDN: 'Michelle' images are of the owner; shutterstock_* images were excluded as stock. ABOUT-US-SECTION png included tentatively (could not visually verify it is original vs. graphic). (7) Some about-page copy was paraphrased by the fetch tool; tagline is the only verbatim quote I'm certain of.
